languages.text: "Мнение сенешаля {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}заслуживает доверия{/d}, особенно если принимать во внимание ее многолетнюю безупречную службу". {n}Изимонд вскидывает руку к израненной глазнице, утирая выступившие капли крови.{/n}
languages.translation_comment:
Спикер: Изимонд
Не играет DL_IzimondArrestedOrDead
DL_LariaPlan_counter +1

traits.locale_text: [Драфт] Изимонд заявляет, что Лария, несомненно заслуживает доверие, нельзя игнорировать мнение верного сенешаля. Можем намекнуть на ранение.

languages.translation_comment:
Спикер: Изимонд
Не играет DL_IzimondArrestedOrDead
DL_LariaPlan_counter +1

languages.text: "The Seneschal's opinion {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}should be trusted{/d}, especially considering her many years of impeccable service." {n}Sauerback brings his hand to his wounded eye socket, wiping away drops of blood.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Мнение сенешаля {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}заслуживает доверия{/d}, особенно если принимать во внимание ее многолетнюю безупречную службу". {n}Изимонд вскидывает руку к израненной глазнице, утирая выступившие капли крови.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "The Seneschal's opinion {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}should be trusted{/d}, especially considering her many years of impeccable service." {n}Sauerback brings his hand to his wounded eye socket, wiping away drops of blood.{/n}

"The Seneschal's opinion should be trusted, especially considering her many years of impeccable service." {n}Sauerback brings his hand to his wounded eye socket, wiping away drops of blood.{/n}

languages.text: “总领的意见{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}值得信赖{/d}，这么多年她从未出过差错。”{n}苏尔贝克抬手抹了一把受伤的眼窝，擦掉血迹。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Seneschal's opinion {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}should be trusted{/d}, especially considering her many years of impeccable service." {n}Sauerback brings his hand to his wounded eye socket, wiping away drops of blood.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “总领的意见{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}值得信赖{/d}，这么多年她从未出过差错。”{n}苏尔贝克抬手抹了一把受伤的眼窝，擦掉血迹。{/n}

languages.text: « Vous {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}devriez vous fier{/d} à l'avis de la sénéchale, du fait de ses nombreuses années d'un service sans faille. » {n}Sauerback porte une main à son orbite blessée, essuyant d'un geste quelques gouttes de sang.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Seneschal's opinion {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}should be trusted{/d}, especially considering her many years of impeccable service." {n}Sauerback brings his hand to his wounded eye socket, wiping away drops of blood.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Vous {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}devriez vous fier{/d} à l'avis de la sénéchale, du fait de ses nombreuses années d'un service sans faille. » {n}Sauerback porte une main à son orbite blessée, essuyant d'un geste quelques gouttes de sang.{/n}

languages.text: «La opinión de la Senescal {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}es de confianza{/d}, especialmente dados sus numerosos años de servicio impecable». {n}Sauerback se lleva la mano a la cuenca ocular herida para secarse la sangre.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Seneschal's opinion {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}should be trusted{/d}, especially considering her many years of impeccable service." {n}Sauerback brings his hand to his wounded eye socket, wiping away drops of blood.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «La opinión de la Senescal {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}es de confianza{/d}, especialmente dados sus numerosos años de servicio impecable». {n}Sauerback se lleva la mano a la cuenca ocular herida para secarse la sangre.{/n}

languages.text: "Seneşal'in {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}fikrine güvenilmeli{/d}, özellikle de uzun yıllara dayanan kusursuz hizmeti göz önüne alındığında." {n}Sauerback, elini yaralı göz çukuruna götürüp kan damlalarını siliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Seneschal's opinion {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}should be trusted{/d}, especially considering her many years of impeccable service." {n}Sauerback brings his hand to his wounded eye socket, wiping away drops of blood.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Seneşal'in {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}fikrine güvenilmeli{/d}, özellikle de uzun yıllara dayanan kusursuz hizmeti göz önüne alındığında." {n}Sauerback, elini yaralı göz çukuruna götürüp kan damlalarını siliyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ihr {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}solltet der Meinung der Truchsessin vertrauen{/d}, zumal sie der Dynastie jahrelang treu gedient hat." {n}Sauerback wischt sich mit seiner Hand einen Tropfen Blut von seiner verletzten Augenhöhle.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Seneschal's opinion {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}should be trusted{/d}, especially considering her many years of impeccable service." {n}Sauerback brings his hand to his wounded eye socket, wiping away drops of blood.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ihr {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}solltet der Meinung der Truchsessin vertrauen{/d}, zumal sie der Dynastie jahrelang treu gedient hat." {n}Sauerback wischt sich mit seiner Hand einen Tropfen Blut von seiner verletzten Augenhöhle.{/n}

languages.text: 「家令長の意見は{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}信頼できる{/d}。特に、彼女が長年、完璧な仕事ぶりを見せたことを考えると。」{n}サワーバックは、傷ついた目の奥を手で触れ、血の滴を拭き取る。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Seneschal's opinion {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}should be trusted{/d}, especially considering her many years of impeccable service." {n}Sauerback brings his hand to his wounded eye socket, wiping away drops of blood.{/n}
